differential_diagnoses: Thyrotoxicosis (e.g., painless thyroiditis or Graves' disease)
Bipolar disorder with catatonia or neuroleptic malignant syndrome
next_steps: Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, T3) and TSH receptor antibodies
Consider TPO antibodies and thyroglobulin levels
Monitor for hemodynamic instability and autonomic hyperactivity
Perform lumbar puncture for autoimmune encephalitis panel (NMDA receptor antibodies)
Consult neurology for further seizure monitoring and potential video EEG
Consult endocrinology for management of suspected thyrotoxicosis
